summary: Completed testing of three new NotaryChain features: P1: Comprehensive Admin Analytics (100% working with recharts), P2: Notarization Certificate UI (100% working), P3: Custom Blueprint Creator (100% working after bug fix). Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in create_blueprint endpoint.

issues: Console warnings about span child of select/option - minor React hydration warning, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: MongoDB ObjectId was not being excluded in create_blueprint return - added blueprint.pop('_id', None)
Fixed: datetime object was not JSON serializable in create_blueprint - converted to isoformat
Good: Comprehensive analytics endpoint returns all data needed for charts (user_growth, revenue_trends, notarization_volume, payment_distribution, top_notaries, document_types, transaction_types)
Good: Certificate page has proper error handling with Go Back button
Good: Blueprint Creator UI has all required elements: form fields, add step, preview, save
Good: Analytics tab displays Revenue Trends (Area Chart), User Growth (Line Chart), Payment Distribution (Pie Chart), Notarization Volume (Bar Chart)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed blueprints during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Three new features (P1, P2, P3) fully tested. 2) Analytics tab in Admin Dashboard shows charts using recharts library. 3) Certificate page requires a sealed package to display (shows error for non-existent/unauthorized requests). 4) Blueprint Creator allows creating custom transaction workflows with steps. 5) Bug fixed: MongoDB ObjectId serialization in create_blueprint endpoint.

bug_fixed.issue: MongoDB _id ObjectId included in response causing JSON serialization error (520)
bug_fixed.fix: Added blueprint.pop('_id', None) and converted created_at datetime to isoformat

recharts_integration.data_format: Correctly formatted for recharts (date, value objects)
